attributes.title: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Node Health
attributes.description: Detailed node-level monitoring covering CPU, memory, storage, network, and certificate expiration across all nodes in the Redis Enterprise cluster.

params.markdown:
## [Redis Enterprise OTel] Node Health

Infrastructure health for each node in the cluster:
- Node availability and CPU utilisation breakdown
- Memory availability and provisioning headroom
- Ephemeral and persistent storage capacity
- Network throughput per node
- TLS certificate expiration tracking

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS node_status = MAX(node_up) BY node
| STATS nodes_up = SUM(node_status), total_nodes = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS node_status = MAX(node_up) BY node
| STATS nodes_up = SUM(node_status), total_nodes = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = node_cpu_user + node_cpu_system
| EVAL cpu_total = cpu_used + node_cpu_idle + node_cpu_iowait
| STATS avg_pct = AVG((cpu_used / cpu_total) * 100)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = node_cpu_user + node_cpu_system
| EVAL cpu_total = cpu_used + node_cpu_idle + node_cpu_iowait
| STATS avg_pct = AVG((cpu_used / cpu_total) * 100)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_free_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS free_mem = AVG(node_free_memory) BY node
| STATS total_free = SUM(free_mem)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_free_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS free_mem = AVG(node_free_memory) BY node
| STATS total_free = SUM(free_mem)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cert_expiration_seconds IS NOT NULL
| STATS min_expiry_secs = MIN(node_cert_expiration_seconds)
| EVAL min_expiry_days = ROUND(min_expiry_secs / 86400, 0)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cert_expiration_seconds IS NOT NULL
| STATS min_expiry_secs = MIN(node_cert_expiration_seconds)
| EVAL min_expiry_days = ROUND(min_expiry_secs / 86400, 0)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ephemeral_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS es_avail = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail) BY node
| STATS total_ephemeral = SUM(es_avail)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ephemeral_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS es_avail = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail) BY node
| STATS total_ephemeral = SUM(es_avail)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_persistent_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS ps_avail = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail) BY node
| STATS total_persistent = SUM(ps_avail)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_persistent_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS ps_avail = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail) BY node
| STATS total_persistent = SUM(ps_avail)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ingress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ingress = AVG(node_ingress_bytes) BY node
| STATS total_ingress = SUM(avg_ingress)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ingress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ingress = AVG(node_ingress_bytes) BY node
| STATS total_ingress = SUM(avg_ingress)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_egress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_egress = AVG(node_egress_bytes) BY node
| STATS total_egress = SUM(avg_egress)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_egress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_egress = AVG(node_egress_bytes) BY node
| STATS total_egress = SUM(avg_egress)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_user = AVG(node_cpu_user) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_user = AVG(node_cpu_user) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_system IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_system = AVG(node_cpu_system) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cpu_system IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_system = AVG(node_cpu_system) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_free_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS free_memory = AVG(node_free_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_free_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS free_memory = AVG(node_free_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_available_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS available = AVG(node_available_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_available_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS available = AVG(node_available_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ephemeral_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS ephemeral = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ephemeral_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS ephemeral = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_persistent_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS persistent = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_persistent_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS persistent = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ingress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS ingress = AVG(node_ingress_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_ingress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS ingress = AVG(node_ingress_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_egress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS egress = AVG(node_egress_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_egress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS egress = AVG(node_egress_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cert_expiration_seconds IS NOT NULL
| STATS expiry_secs = MIN(node_cert_expiration_seconds) BY node, path
| EVAL expiry_secs = COALESCE(expiry_secs, 0)
| EVAL expiry_days = ROUND(expiry_secs / 86400, 0)
| SORT expiry_days ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_cert_expiration_seconds IS NOT NULL
| STATS expiry_secs = MIN(node_cert_expiration_seconds) BY node, path
| EVAL expiry_secs = COALESCE(expiry_secs, 0)
| EVAL expiry_days = ROUND(expiry_secs / 86400, 0)
| SORT expiry_days ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = COALESCE(node_cpu_user, 0.0) + COALESCE(node_cpu_system, 0.0)
| STATS Status = MAX(node_up), `CPU Used` = AVG(cpu_used), `CPU I/O Wait` = AVG(node_cpu_iowait), `Free Memory` = AVG(node_free_memory), `Available Memory` = AVG(node_available_memory), `Ephemeral Storage` = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail), `Persistent Storage` = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail), `Ingress` = AVG(node_ingress_bytes), `Egress` = AVG(node_egress_bytes), `AOF Rewrites` = AVG(node_cur_aof_rewrites) BY node
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `CPU Used` = COALESCE(`CPU Used`, 0.0), `CPU I/O Wait` = COALESCE(`CPU I/O Wait`, 0.0), `Free Memory` = COALESCE(`Free Memory`, 0), `Available Memory` = COALESCE(`Available Memory`, 0), `Ephemeral Storage` = COALESCE(`Ephemeral Storage`, 0), `Persistent Storage` = COALESCE(`Persistent Storage`, 0), `Ingress` = COALESCE(`Ingress`, 0), `Egress` = COALESCE(`Egress`, 0), `AOF Rewrites` = COALESCE(`AOF Rewrites`, 0)
| SORT node ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_up IS NOT NULL
| EVAL cpu_used = COALESCE(node_cpu_user, 0.0) + COALESCE(node_cpu_system, 0.0)
| STATS Status = MAX(node_up), `CPU Used` = AVG(cpu_used), `CPU I/O Wait` = AVG(node_cpu_iowait), `Free Memory` = AVG(node_free_memory), `Available Memory` = AVG(node_available_memory), `Ephemeral Storage` = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail), `Persistent Storage` = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail), `Ingress` = AVG(node_ingress_bytes), `Egress` = AVG(node_egress_bytes), `AOF Rewrites` = AVG(node_cur_aof_rewrites) BY node
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `CPU Used` = COALESCE(`CPU Used`, 0.0), `CPU I/O Wait` = COALESCE(`CPU I/O Wait`, 0.0), `Free Memory` = COALESCE(`Free Memory`, 0), `Available Memory` = COALESCE(`Available Memory`, 0), `Ephemeral Storage` = COALESCE(`Ephemeral Storage`, 0), `Persistent Storage` = COALESCE(`Persistent Storage`, 0), `Ingress` = COALESCE(`Ingress`, 0), `Egress` = COALESCE(`Egress`, 0), `AOF Rewrites` = COALESCE(`AOF Rewrites`, 0)
| SORT node ASC
| LIMIT 100
